query: SELECT id, JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements')) AS num_improvements, JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks')) AS links_in_imp0 FROM reviews WHERE id IN (600004, 630001, 630002) ORDER BY id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute SELECT id, JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements')) AS num_improvements, JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks')) AS links_in_imp0 FROM reviews WHERE id IN (600004, 630001, 630002) ORDER BY id;
